title: Automation Of HBM's Nuclear Tech
description:
This integrated package is a Tutorial for HBM
Refer to Bilibili creators 瞳彩鹿454445
body:
This integrated package contains multiple mods that can automate the entire industrial process

The content of modpack:
1.mixinbootstraplegacy:Without this mod, PCL cannot start
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixinbootstraplegacy

2.Better Builders Wands:This mod can help you quickly build buildings and is very practical
https://modrinth.com/mod/better-builders-wands

3.Better Fps&Foamfix:These two are rare performance mods in older versions that can make your gaming experience smoother
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfps
https://modrinth.com/mod/foamfix

4.Chicken Chunks:When you go mining or collecting food, you will leave the area where your machine is working, which may cause your machine to stop working. The block loader will avoid this and can keep the area where your machine is located from stopping
https://modrinth.com/mod/chicken-chunks

5.NotEnoughItems Unofficial:Don't say too much about this mod, it's similar to the higher versions of JEI and EMI
https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughitems-unofficial

6.Not Enough Characters:This mod adds the capability to search Chinese characters with Pinyin in NEI. 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-enough-characters

7.CraftGuide:CraftGuide is a fairly simple in-game recipe viewer for Minecraft with the goal of being able to display a lot of information at once, and have some fairly simple ways to quickly navigate it.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/craftguide

8.Deconstruction Table:This mod adds a new kind of Crafting Table to minecraft, but not just any table... A table that is able to "undo" the work of a regular Crafting table
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deconstruction-table

9.EasyLAN:A Minecraft Forge Mod for Custom LAN Servers Related settings for customizing the LAN server
https://modrinth.com/mod/easylan

10.Ender IO:This is the core mod that automates your machine
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-io

11.GraveStone Mod:Every time you die, a grave is placed at your position. To retrieve your items just break the grave. There is also a config option to get your items back by sneaking on the grave
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod

12.NTM Space:This is the core gameplay of this mod pack
https://modrinth.com/mod/ntmspace

13.InputFix&InputMethodBlocker (Legacy):It will benifit the player which use Chinese
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inputfix
https://modrinth.com/mod/inputmethodblocker

14.Iron Backpacks:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-backpacks

15.Iron Chests:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests

16.OpenComputers:This mod adds computers that can be programmed in Lua 5.2 and 5.3. Computers persist across saves (i.e. execution resumes where the computer was saved when it is loaded again), they are highly modular (there are graphics cards, network cards, redstone cards, ...). If a compatible power generating mod is present, by default they will need power to run - however, like pretty much everything else about the mod, this can be changed in the config.
https://modrinth.com/mod/opencomputers

17.SecurityCraft:https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft

18.Waila:Waila (What Am I Looking At) is a UI improvement mod aimed at providing block information directly ingame, without the need of opening an UI.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila

19.Xaero's World Map&Xaero's Minimap:
https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map
https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map
